map.description: Real-time geospatial map of India spanning 2 columns and 2 rows. Use dark tiles. Add pulsing red markers for live fires.

cards.style: bg-[#111111] border border-white/10 rounded-lg shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden

forms.inputs: bg-black border border-white/20 focus:border-[#2A66FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2A66FF] text-white rounded-md p-2 w-full

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF2A2A] hover:bg-[#E60000] text-white font-bold tracking-wide transition-all rounded px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-[#2A66FF] hover:bg-[#0044FF] text-white font-bold tracking-wide transition-all rounded px-4 py-2

live_feed.style: flex flex-col gap-3 max-h-[400px] overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar
live_feed.item: p-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded border-l-2 border-l-[#FF2A2A]

motion.entrance: framer-motion staggered fade-in up for dashboard widgets

images.description: Subtle low-opacity background for auth or landing sections

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a 4-column bento grid dashboard layout. The Map component should span at least 2 columns and 2 rows (e.g., col-span-1 md:col-span-2 row-span-2).
Strictly adhere to the dark theme requested: Use Black (#050505) base with Red (#FF2A2A) and Blue (#2A66FF) accents.
Do NOT use pure white backgrounds anywhere.
Use react-leaflet with CartoDB Dark Matter tiles (URL provided) and center on India (lat: 20.5937, lng: 78.9629, zoom: 4). Ensure you install leaflet and react-leaflet.
Implement the Fire Prediction Form (inputs: longitude, latitude, wind speed, vegetation index). Display results with a glowing chart or high-contrast typography.
Implement Report Fire Incident Form inside a card.
Implement Live Fire Incidents Feed as a scrolling list with pulsing red status indicators.
Implement Historical Fire Data using Recharts (Line/Bar) with a red-to-blue gradient.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
Install and use Chivo and JetBrains Mono fonts.
